title: Questions from Quarantine: How Risky Are Holiday Gatherings?
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . Questions from Quarantine: How Risky Are Holiday Gatherings? result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, which addresses public concerns during the COVID-19 pandemic. It specifically highlights an episode discussing the risks associated with holiday gatherings, reflecting the series' focus on providing guidance for maintaining mental and physical health during the global crisis. The piece encourages audience participation by inviting questions via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. While the body text is primarily promotional for the series, it situates the discussion within broader contexts of coronavirus response, public health, and global security, as indicated by the associated topics and tags.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在解答COVID-19大流行期间的公众关切。文章特别提及其中一期节目讨论了假日聚会的相关风险，体现了该系列为全球危机中保持身心健康提供指导的宗旨。文章鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提问参与互动。正文内容主要是对该系列节目的宣传，但将讨论置于冠状病毒应对、公共卫生和全球安全等更广泛的背景之下，这与文章标注的相关主题和标签一致。
